cases.context: The BLA for relapsed SCLC is currently under review by CDE.
The BLA for gMG was accepted in China.
The company plans BLA filing in 2027 after registrational data.
The IND application for COPD was approved by NMPA.
China IND application for atopic dermatitis was accepted.
We advanced preclinical work and improved PK stability.
LBL-024 remains on track for BLA submission in Q3 2026.
The first global Phase 3 trial is planned to start in 2026.
PCC nomination in H1 2027 remains our key R&D catalyst.
The company plans to present updated data at ASCO 2026.
Phase 2 readout expected by year-end 2026 for the lead asset.
cases.expected: Phase 2 readout expected by year-end 2026 for the lead asset
